name: Steamed Fish
recipeIngredient: 1 pound frozen catfish, trout or flounder fillets, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half the fillets or 2 trout on a plate.
2. Combine mushrooms, bacon, onion, celery, and ginger in a small bowl. Spread each fillet with half the filling; top with remaining fillets, overlapping pieces if necessary. Or, if using whole trout, stuff each trout with part of the mixture. Sprinkle any remaining stuffing around the trout.
3. Combine wine, soy sauce, Worcestershire, and red pepper seasoning; spoon over fish.
4. Cover and steam over low heat for 15 minutes, or until fish flakes easily.
Note: To make a makeshift steamer, save 3 cans that are uniform in size and will fit inside a saucepan or pot with lid. Punch several small holes in the sides of the cans with a can opener. Arrange them at the bottom of the pan, add 1 inch of water, place the plate with fish on top, cover, and steam over the stove.
